layout_and_spacing.padding: generous, use p-6 or p-8 inside cards. App wrapper should have p-4 md:p-8.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-md (8px) for a sharp, objective feel
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Use 'Grid Borders' or flat surfaces with 1px border. No heavy drop shadows. Rely on 1px solid borders.

components_strategy.buttons: Flat, no shadow. Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50.
components_strategy.cards: border border-slate-200 bg-white p-6. No shadow by default. Hover state: slight lift -translate-y-1 and shadow-md.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn defaults but force rounded-md, border-slate-200, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7].
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Use sharp lines, straight edges. No smooth curves on line charts (type='linear'). Colors: Primary blue, Slate.
components_strategy.tables: Dense. text-sm. border-b on rows. Hover: bg-slate-50.

instructions_to_main_agent: Setup Google Fonts: Include 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' in index.html and update tailwind.config.js font families accordingly.
All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, select, links) MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format representing their specific role. (e.g., data-testid='create-task-button')

Implement Recharts for the Admin Dashboard. Include a BarChart for workload comparison and a PieChart for task status breakdown. Keep chart styling sharp and flat (no 3D or rounded bar corners if possible).
Employee Task Workspace: Implement a Kanban board layout for Todo, In-Progress, Done status lists, or a highly scanable dense grid list with clear priority badges.
Header/Nav: Fixed or sticky top navigation with solid white or backdrop-blur background, including user avatar (use provided media URLs), role badge, and logout CTA.
DO NOT use any placeholder images (like via.placeholder.com). Use the URLs in media.avatars.
Include Shadcn UI for dropdowns, selects, modals, and toasts. Customize standard Shadcn borders to be sharper (max rounded-md) to fit the Swiss High-Contrast theme.
Form actions should always show loading states and emit toast notifications upon success or error.
